data.body: Fix pushed to Gerrit change 267 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/267). Extracted tested load_local_tickets() reading .cache.json['state']; 13 reconcile_check unit tests pass incl. the all-orphaned regression repro; 331 orchestrate+state tests green; lint+typecheck clean. Live re-run post-fix: checked=627, orphaned=0 (was checked=0/orphaned=627). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes.
